content: {"analyses": [{"source_url": "https://permafrost.woodwellclimate.org/mitigation-policy/", "source_title": "Mitigation policy - Permafrost Pathways - Woodwell Climate", "source_type": "web", "source_quality": 0.7, "overall_relevance": 0.65, "year": 0, "authors": [], "venue": "", "doi": "", "atomic_facts": [{"statement": "Depending on how hot we let it get, carbon emissions from Arctic permafrost thaw are expected to be in the range of 30 to more than 150 bill...", "direct_quote": "Depending on how hot we let it get, carbon emissions from Arctic permafrost thaw are expected to be in the range of 30 to more than 150 billion tons of carbon (110 to more than 550 Gt CO2) this century, with upper estimates on par with the cumulative", "fact_category": "statistic", "relevance_score": 0.65, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}, {"statement": "Data from Schuur et al. 2015, the Union of Concerned Scientists for 2019.", "direct_quote": "Data from Schuur et al. 2015, the Union of Concerned Scientists for 2019.", "fact_category": "statistic", "relevance_score": 0.65, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}], "evidence_summary": "Auto-extracted 2 facts."}]}
